meaning: n.普通,将军,概要adj.一般的,普通的,综合的,概括的,全面的,大体的 n.常规
examples: The General refused to be flustered.
The general gave the order to advance.
And he commented that Nato would continue following the strategy put in place by General McChrystal.
But the presence of Honda is bad news either way for your General Motors dividends.
